name: commit-confessional-vscode-detector
description: Logs paste events and heuristic AI extension activation events to VS Code output and a local backend.

commitConfessional.backendUrl.description: Local backend URL that receives extension events.

commitConfessional.aiExtensions.description: VS Code extension IDs to watch for activation.

commitConfessional.promptWindowMs.description: How long a recent paste or prompt-like edit is considered relevant when correlating AI activation.

commitConfessional.pasteMinLength.description: Minimum inserted text length before a clipboard match is treated as a paste event.
